name: Goal Rise Logistics (China) Holdings Limited
summary: Goal Rise Logistics (China) Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides a range of logistics services for customers supply chains in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Transportation Services, Warehousing Services, In-Plant Logistics Services, and Customisation Services segments. The Transportation Services segment offers delivery of production materials, components, and finished goods. The Warehousing Services segment offers provision of inventory storage and management services. The In-Plant Logistics Services segment offers a range of in-house services at customers' manufacturing plants, including management of the movements of production materials and components, and work-in progress to the production lines, as well as finished goods to the factory gates of the relevant customers. The Customisation Services segment offers labelling and bundling services. It serves customers from various industries, including pharmaceutical, fast-moving consumer goods, packaging, health and beauty, and other industries. Goal Rise Logistics (China) Holdings Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
